hero.title: Web & UI/UX Designer, Front-end Integration.
hero.description: Currently UX/UI Consultant for TMS Group, I empower our partners by designing engaging interfaces that not only captivate users but also drive businesses toward their most ambitious goals.

experience.title: Over a decade, I have been building bridges between human emotion and technological innovation.

portfolio.title: Selected Works.
portfolio.description: A collection of digital products and brand identities crafted with precision, focusing on the intersection of human behavior and technological capability.

recommendations.title: Kind Words.
recommendations.description: What colleagues and partners say about working with me.
recommendations.ctaDescription: Your feedback helps me grow and connect with future collaborators, so please feel free to leave a message.

contact.title: Let's connect.
contact.description: Whether you have a groundbreaking idea or just want to discuss the future of design over a good
contact.descriptionEnd: (or a coffee), my door is always open in my beautiful city.
contact.closingText: I truly believe the best collaborations start with a simple conversation (often around a drink). Let's meet now to explore how we can truly build something exceptional together.
